The '''Hush-About AJP-400''', also known simply as the '''Hush-About Personal Jetpack''', was a personal [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] manufactured by [[Arakyd Aerodynes, Inc.]]

==Description==
[[Arakyd Aerodynes, Inc.]]'s Hush-About AJP-400 was a lightweight and streamlined [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] which featured a single jet [[Engine/Legends|engine]]. Straps looped around the wearer's shoulders to secure the unit on their back, with a belt that could be fastened around the waist. Control of the unit was managed by an armature mounted on the right side of the jetpack that the operator could control with their hand.<ref name="GFT" />

A fully-fuelled Hush-About could hold a maximum of ten charges. Each charge could lift the jetpack a maximum of 200 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] vertically or 500 meters horizontally. The unit could also be run on a continuous charge-feed.<ref name="GFT" />

The Hush-About AJP-400 cost between 1,800<ref name="GFT" /> and 3,750 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the jetpack.<ref name="FUCG" /> Each [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] recharge and [[Coolant/Legends|coolant]] refill cost a further 150 credits. A portable carrying case for the jetpack could also be purchased for another 150 credits.<ref name="GFT" />

The jetpack was considered to be virtually soundless, using [[Sound baffler]]s and [[auditory dampener]]s to reduce the noise generated by the Hush-About. Picking up the noise from the unit was difficult for [[Audio sensor/Legends|auditory pickups]].<ref name="GFT" />

==History==
The Hush-About AJP-400 was designed for travel in urban environments where noise ordinances would prohibit standard [[Rocket pack/Legends|rocket]] and jetpack use. Although designed for commercial use,<ref name="GFT" /> the Hush-About was used by agents opposed to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] while conducting espionage and sabotage missions.<ref name="FUCG" /> The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used the AJP-400's around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].<ref name="M17">''[[Star Wars Missions 17: Darth Vader's Return]]''</ref>
